name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-55
title: Dispatch preamble + Inv 17 + test use plain [rabbit] prefix instead of [rabbit emoji] brand string
description:
Sibling to closed RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-1 (split by feature scope).

Three drift sites in tdd-subagent use the plain '[rabbit]' prefix instead of the canonical emoji-framed brand '[(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)]' per contract Inv 35/36 and tdd-subagent Inv 5:

1. .claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/dispatch-tdd-subagent.py line 219: yellow-coloured preamble note literal '[rabbit] NOTE:' should be the emoji-framed form
2. .claude/features/tdd-subagent/docs/spec/spec.md Inv 17 (lines 206-217, NOTE: original BUG-1 misnamed this as Inv 24): wording 'yellow-coloured [rabbit] note' should describe the emoji-framed form so spec sanctions the brand
3. .claude/features/tdd-subagent/test/test-backlog-4-6-7-9-10.py line 93: substring assertion currently hard-asserts '[rabbit]' — must update to assert the emoji-framed form (and ideally a negative assertion for the bare form)

Fix is cosmetic; no behavior change. Companion bug RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-5 covers the rabbit-feature side (SKILL.md + spec Inv 9 wording + regression test). They land as two separate PRs.
